title: Consultant Digital Analytics (all genders)
description_snippet:
Wir gehören zu den Top-Adressen in der IT-Welt und fokussieren uns auf die Optimierung der Kerngeschäftsprozesse unserer Kunden. Durch den smarten Einsatz maßgeschneiderter IT-Lösungen unterstützen wir unsere Kunden dabei, das Beste aus ihrem Business und aktuellen Technologien herauszuholen. Unseren Erfolg aber erreichen wir nur durch eins: die Menschen bei adesso! Sie bringen Ideen, fachliches Know how und Technologien zusammen. Gemeinsam programmieren wir (deine) Zukunft bei adesso.

DEINE ROLLE


Analytics-Konzeption: Entwickle Analytics-Strategien und konzipiere individuelle Lösungen für komplexe Herausforderungen in Web- und App-Projekten.
Implementierung: Implementiere Analytics-Tools und richte Tag-Management-, Tracking- und Consent-Management-Systeme für unsere Kunden ein.

description_full:
Wir gehören zu den Top-Adressen in der IT-Welt und fokussieren uns auf die Optimierung der Kerngeschäftsprozesse unserer Kunden. Durch den smarten Einsatz maßgeschneiderter IT-Lösungen unterstützen wir unsere Kunden dabei, das Beste aus ihrem Business und aktuellen Technologien herauszuholen. Unseren Erfolg aber erreichen wir nur durch eins: die Menschen bei adesso! Sie bringen Ideen, fachliches Know how und Technologien zusammen. Gemeinsam programmieren wir (deine) Zukunft bei adesso.

DEINE ROLLE


Analytics-Konzeption: Entwickle Analytics-Strategien und konzipiere individuelle Lösungen für komplexe Herausforderungen in Web- und App-Projekten.
Implementierung: Implementiere Analytics-Tools und richte Tag-Management-, Tracking- und Consent-Management-Systeme für unsere Kunden ein.
Reporting & Dashboards: Erstelle Berichte und interaktive Dashboards, visualisiere Ergebnisse und interpretiere diese gemeinsam mit internen Teams im Online Marketing.
Compliance & Prozesse: Optimiere Prozesse und unterstütze unsere Kunden dabei, technische und rechtliche Anforderungen wie die Cookie-Compliance einzuhalten.
Wissensvermittlung: Vermittle Wissen, indem du interne und externe Schulungen zu Analytics-Themen durchführst.
Strategische Beratung: Berate Kunden und begleite sie beim strategischen Ausbau ihres Trackings.


DEIN PROFIL


Analytics- und Tracking-Systeme: Durch deine mehrjährige Berufserfahrung (mind. 3 Jahre) kennst du bereits Tools wie Piwik PRO, Matomo oder Google Analytics und bist mit Tag-Management- und Dashboard-Systemen vertraut. Aber auch Consent Management Plattformen sind dir nicht unbekannt und du verstehst die Funktion von Cookie Bannern auf Webseiten und in Mobile Apps.
Online-Marketing Expertise: Insbesondere datengetriebene Kampagnen gehören zu deinem Fachwissen.
Technisches Verständnis: Du bringst fundiertes Know-how in Webtechnologien und Programmiersprachen wie HTML, CSS und JavaScript mit.
Kenntnisse zur strategischen Analytics-Beratung: Idealerweise bringst du erste Erfahrung mit ganzheitlichen Datenstrategien für Unternehmen mit und bist begeisterungsfähig für technologische Entwicklungen und Trends im Analytics-Bereich.
Kommunikationsstärke: Du bist vertriebsorientiert und begeisterst andere für das Thema Digital Marketing.
KI Kompetenz: Du setzt KI-Tools in deinem Fachgebiet souverän ein, bewertest die Ergebnisse kritisch und unterstützt Kunden und adessi dabei, Potenziale von KI zu nutzen.
Sprachkenntnisse: Deine sehr guten Deutsch- und guten Englischkenntnisse ermöglichen dir eine sichere Kommunikation.


Unser Versprechen: Du wirst dich bei uns wohlfühlen! Kollegial, familiär und auf Augenhöhe – wir leben Austausch, Teamgeist und einen respektvollen Umgang miteinander. Diversität und verschiedene Blickwinkel werden bei uns genauso geschätzt wie du als Mensch. Das und viel mehr steht für unser ganz besonderes Wir-Gefühl. Für das es sogar ein Wort gibt: adessi.

Unsere Kultur und das Zusammenarbeiten sind geprägt von gegenseitiger Wertschätzung, Anerkennung und Unterstützung. Das verbindet uns hierarchieübergreifend – auch im Home-Office. So belegen wir zum wiederholten Mal den 1. Platz beim Wettbewerb „Deutschlands Beste Arbeitgeber in der ITK“!. Unser umfangreiches Trainingsangebot und ein transparentes Laufbahnstufenmodell für alle sorgen dafür, dass deine Entwicklung bei uns nicht stillsteht. Denn gemeinsam zu wachsen und Chancengeber zu sein, das ist programmiert in unserer DNA.

Do you thrive in fast-paced environments and have a passion for renewable energy?

As our Go-to-Market AI & Data Associate, you will be the co-architect of our data ecosystem. You’ll take full ownership of making customer and revenue data accessible, building internally used applications from the ground up, and deploying AI to supercharge our growth.




Please note that for this role, C2 English proficiency is required. This is a full-time, on-site position based in Berlin.




What You’ll Do

Process Innovation & AI Implementation: You will dive deep into our customer-oriented workflows to reshape them with your creative, AI-driven ideas and technical skills. As the owner of the implementation, you won't just strategize—you will personally drive these improvements from concept to reality
description_full:
Do you thrive in fast-paced environments and have a passion for renewable energy?

As our Go-to-Market AI & Data Associate, you will be the co-architect of our data ecosystem. You’ll take full ownership of making customer and revenue data accessible, building internally used applications from the ground up, and deploying AI to supercharge our growth.




Please note that for this role, C2 English proficiency is required. This is a full-time, on-site position based in Berlin.




What You’ll Do

Process Innovation & AI Implementation: You will dive deep into our customer-oriented workflows to reshape them with your creative, AI-driven ideas and technical skills. As the owner of the implementation, you won't just strategize—you will personally drive these improvements from concept to reality.
Vertical Owner (Data Driven Analytics): You will relentlessly improve our data product experience by working with internal and external stakeholders to identify bottlenecks, refine analytical fit, and personally onboard them into a world-class, data-driven workflow.
Data Accessibility: Design and maintain robust pipelines to make data from our customers, HubSpot, and Aircall fully usable and accessible across the organization.
AI Integration: Implement AI-driven workflows and predictive models to automate insights, lead scoring, and trend forecasting.
Hands-on Engineering: Work directly in Python (or TypeScript) to integrate diverse data sources yourself.
Strategic Impact: Collaborate with Sales, Marketing, and Success teams to transform complex datasets into powerful BI dashboards that drive faster, smarter decisions.




What Makes You a Great Fit

You are hungry, driven, and eager to find smart, efficient solutions. You don't just accept the status quo—you constantly look for ways to innovate and optimize.
You are an expert in using n8n, Python (TypeScript is a bonus) and have a deep understanding of modern BI tools and SQL.
You are passionate about how AI can optimize revenue processes and have the skills to implement it.
Bonus: Ideally, you have experience in BI or Data Engineering, with a proven track record of building data warehouses and integrating SaaS tools (like HubSpot or Aircall)
You are proactive and structured, you don’t wait for a ticket; you identify bottlenecks in our data flow and fix them.
You are fluent in English. Proficiency in German, Italian, French or Portuguese is a plus.




Why Join Us?

Be part of one of the fastest growing VC-backed startup in Germany with 2000+ satisfied B2B customers.
A vibrant, collaborative office culture where great ideas happen face-to-face — we're a full in-person team (5 days/week) in a beautiful Berlin office near Hackescher Markt.
Enjoy opportunities for personal and professional growth.
Receive competitive pay.
Perks include gym membership, coffee, regular team events, MacBook and more.
Embrace the freedom to innovate and make quick changes in a dynamic team.




Even if you don’t meet every requirement, we encourage you to apply! Imposter syndrome shouldn't hold you back—we value talent and passion above all.




About Reonic

At Reonic, we’re on a mission to simplify renewable technology with our B2B SaaS solutions for solar, storage, and heat pumps. Backed by top-tier investors and trusted by 2000+ business customers, we’re growing fast—and we need YOU to help us accommodate our new and existing customers.

Springer Nature opens the doors to discovery for researchers, educators, clinicians and other professionals. Every day, around the globe, our imprints, books, journals, platforms and technology solutions reach millions of people. For over 180 years our brands and imprints have been a trusted source of knowledge to these communities and today, more than ever, we see it as our responsibility to ensure that fundamental knowledge can be found, verified, understood and used by our communities – enabling them to improve outcomes, make progress, and benefit the generations that follow. description_full:
Job Title: Sales Operations Reporting & Analytics Specialist

Locations: Berlin, Dordrecht, London, Singapore and New Delhi

Application Deadline:  6th May 2026

About Springer Nature

Springer Nature opens the doors to discovery for researchers, educators, clinicians and other professionals. Every day, around the globe, our imprints, books, journals, platforms and technology solutions reach millions of people. For over 180 years our brands and imprints have been a trusted source of knowledge to these communities and today, more than ever, we see it as our responsibility to ensure that fundamental knowledge can be found, verified, understood and used by our communities – enabling them to improve outcomes, make progress, and benefit the generations that follow. Visit group.springernature.com and follow @SpringerNature

About The Role 

The Springer Nature Sales Operations Centre of Excellence (SOCoE) is a Dordrecht, London, Berlin, and Heidelberg based team, operating in the academic publishing industry. We are part of our worldwide sales organisation and are tasked to improve the way we work in our day-to-day operations of delivering online scientific content to our customers. The Sales Operations Reporting & Analytics Specialist creates reports and dashboards, analyse metrics, and reports data to the Senior VPs and high-level management. This role is responsible for providing a comprehensive assessment and overall evaluation of reporting deliverables using various systems and visualisation tools.

In the day-to-day business this person will typically work closely with the internal Sales, Sales Operations, and IT departments. Jointly they work on continuous improvement of workflows and the way our services are delivered to the customers.

A significant part of the work will consist of innovating the data and reporting processes and user interface of the CRM systems. The requirements of these improvements will be defined together with stakeholders and key-users.

Purpose of the role:

Creating reports and dashboards, providing data analytics, and implementing projects to drive operational change based on best practices as part of the continuous improvement strategy, whilst supporting business as usual development within the institutional sales organisation.

Role Responsibilities:


 Create and maintain new report templates and dashboards either upon user request or own initiative
 Research and analyse operational data to identify areas of improvement
 Assist in expanding the financial reporting platform across the organisation (Salesforce, Data Studio, GBQ, SAP Query Designer, CRM Analytics)
 Train relevant team members on the different reporting platforms.
 Project manage against set timelines and deliverables
 Contribute to strategic direction for operational improvements
 Support Sales and Sales Operations with continuous improvement
 Proactively initiate projects that align and support the strategic objectives
 Implement and manage change processes
 Manage and translate requirements of change from business to IT
 Provide excellent communication acting as a liaison for key stakeholders
 Provide (online) training to the stakeholder community during the implementation of change
 Support the monthly process of loading Institutional sales into Intelis (manage process when required)
 Contribute to the development of Intelis to meet the needs of the stakeholders
 Contribute to the logic for the calculation of allocated revenue in Salesforce
 Analyse IT tools and suggest changes needed to be able to support initiatives.


Key relationships:


 The Sales Operations Reporting & Analytics Specialist will report to the Director of the Sales Operations Centre of Excellence and be part of the Sales Operations Centre of Excellence team.


Experience, Skills & Qualifications

Essential:


Minimum 6 years’ experience in data analysis, with strong analytical skills and commercial acumen 
Experience with CRM systems and data analysis tools

description_full:
KWS Berlin GmbH is seeking an experienced HR Analytics Expert in HR Systems and Data Management (m/f/d) to join our Global Human Resources Expert Hub Systems & Data Management team. This role is pivotal in driving strategic HR analytics initiatives, ensuring data governance, and delivering advanced reporting solutions to support data-driven decision-making across the organization. The role is full-time and permanent.

Key Responsibilities


Strategic HR Analytics: Develop and implement a global HR analytics strategy aligned with business objectives. Drive predictive and prescriptive analytics initiatives and translate complex data into actionable insights.
Data Governance & Quality: Establish and maintain HR data governance frameworks. Ensure accuracy, consistency, and compliance (including GDPR). Define and monitor key HR KPIs.
Advanced Reporting & Visualization: Design and deliver interactive dashboards and reports using modern BI tools (Power BI, SAP Analytics Cloud). Provide data-driven recommendations.
Collaboration & Stakeholder Management: Partner with HR Business Partners, Expert Hubs, Global Business Operations, Finance, and IT. Act as a trusted advisor to management on HR data trends.
Innovation & Continuous Improvement: Lead initiatives to adopt emerging technologies such as machine learning and AI. Benchmark internal practices against industry standards.
HRIS & Data Management: Contribute expert knowledge in mass data processing and HRIS concept creation. Ensure proper translation of concepts into technical systems and data processes.
Support for Decision Making: Implement HR metrics to determine workforce efficiency and impact. Provide regular and ad-hoc data analysis and trend statistics.
Technical Connection: Support the technical connection between HR and Controlling.
Global Workforce Data Analysis: Compile and analyze workforce data globally, providing insights and recommendations for personnel decisions.
HR Controlling Support: Assist Global Business Operations in HR Controlling aspects, including quarterly and year-end closing operations, sustainability reporting, and audits.


Qualifications


Academic degree in HR, Business Analytics, Data Science, Organizational Management, or related field.
Professional experience in HR Analytics, data management, or business intelligence.
Strong knowledge of project management, data governance, and GDPR compliance.
Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
Over 5 years of experience in HR systems development and implementation, preferably SAP and/or Microsoft-based projects.
Experience with HR KPIs, data visualization, and Predictive Analytics.
Strong IT affinity and familiarity with SAP Applications (SAP-HCM, SAP Business Data Cloud, SAP Datasphere, Analytics Cloud, Business Warehouse, SuccessFactors).
Fluent in English (written and spoken).
Analytical and problem-solving skills.
Solution-oriented and able to work successfully in a project-based environment.
Communication and influencing skills.
Continuous improvement of processes and technical environment.
Customer orientation, accuracy and reliability.
Consulting expertise.


What We Offer


We are an international team of open-minded people with diverse and cross-functional experience 
Interesting and challenging tasks and projects 
As a family business, we are guided by the values of closeness, reliability, vision and independence; this culture is lived in practice and ensures an open and friendly working atmosphere from day one 
The best of both worlds: KWS Berlin combines the security of a large, stable company with the passion of a start-up 
Our location in the heart of Berlin-Schöneberg is very modern; directly opposite the underground station Bülowstraße and with secured car & bicycle parking spaces 
We offer 30d holidays, flexible working hours, holiday and Christmas bonuses, company pension scheme, JobRad and/or Jobticket

description_full:
Senior Insights Consultant Marketing Analytics FMCG (m/w/d)

Let’s be unstoppable together!

At Circana, we are fueled by our passion for continuous learning and growth, we seek and share feedback freely, and we celebrate victories both big and small in an environment that is flexible and accommodating to our work and personal lives. We’re a global company dedicated to fostering inclusivity and belonging. We value and celebrate the unique experiences, cultures, and viewpoints that each individual brings. By embracing a wide range of backgrounds, skills, expertise, and beyond, we create a stronger, more innovative environment for our employees, clients, and communities.

Circana is proud to be Certified™ by Great Place To Work®. This prestigious award is based entirely on what current employees say about their experience working at Circana.

What will you be doing?

The successful candidate will join the EMEA&APAC Media & Analytics Solutions Delivery team whose core objective is to support primarily FMCG (occasionally General Merchandise) manufacturer and retailers with their growth plans by analyzing the impact of their in-store sales and marketing activity and identifying opportunities to improve performance. Recommendations are made on our client’s assortment, media, price and promotional strategies. This is achieved via insightful machine analytics based on EPOS data.

As a Media & Analytics Insights Consultant you will work with a team of consultants across in German as well as EMEA team to support contracted and ad hoc services to Circana’s Media & Analytics clients. Your role will be to manage the delivery of Media & Analytics projects from sign off through the delivery of insights, working closely with both the client and your colleagues in Circana’s EMEA&APAC Media & Analytics Solutions Delivery team.

Job Responsibilities

Project management and Team leading


 Lead teams to leverage data and analysis to make concise and compelling recommendations to clients
 Effectively manage the relationship with the client and its suppliers (eg. Media agency) to ensure all required data is collected and validated
 Be the key liaison between Circana’s data scientists (based in Athens Greece), insights Analysts and commercials to facilitate the delivery process and insights quality
 Ensure quality of the project through building project scope, performing quality checks, tracking timelines, challenging results
 Ensure the adequacy of the study set up and results with client expectations (as described by the SoW)
Interpret clients’ business questions into project specifications understanding project objectives and deliverables for Circana’s analytics solutions
 Prepare impactful and relevant presentation materials (PowerPoint, Excel, potentially Unify-Circana online visualization platform) and potentially present them to the client during the project execution rationalize intermediate outcomes and provide feedback and guidance to Circana’s analysts and data scientists


Insights and Consulting


 Aligning with Circana’s commercial team and make rational, build insights and prepare client presentations on the results of the machine learning data analysis
 In coordination with Circana’s commercial team lead, develop and deliver concise communications and presentations Lead client workshops in delivering and interpreting the results to the client
 Link industry trends and generate new perspectives, ideas or innovations that allow problems to be solved to deliver client actionable insights accelerating clients’ growth
 Build and maintain both support and trust with the client; act as a trusted advisor and delivery partner


Requirements


 Interest in or understanding of marketing strategy, and/or FMCG business/market trends
 Previous relevant experience, preferably with data analysis (insight) or data management background – marketing mix insight delivery a big advantage
 Good knowledge of Media channels and how advertising works essen

Aufgaben

Du möchtest die Finanz- und Planungsprozesse unserer Kunden aktiv mitgestalten und deine Expertise in IBM Planning Analytics (TM1) insbesondere im Frontend- und Backend-Development einsetzen? Dann werde Teil unseres Teams und bringe deine Stärken in anspruchsvollen, internationalen Projekten ein.

Dabei warten die folgenden Aufgaben auf dich:



Entwicklung und Umsetzung von Frontend-Lösungen in Planning Analytics Workspace (PAW) und Planning Analytics for Excel (PAfE) zur Unterstützung datengetriebener Entscheidungen
Aufbau und Weiterentwicklung von Backend-Komponenten wie TM1-Modellen, Cubes, Rules und TurboIntegrator-Prozessen
Entwicklung und Integration von Datenpipelines und Schnittstellen (ETL, APIs, Middleware) sowie Anbindung an Datenbanken (z. B. SQL Server, Oracle)
Zusammenarbeit mit unterschiedlichen Stakeholdern (Kunde, Projektteam, Fachbereiche) zur Aufnahme und Übersetzung von Anforderungen in technische Spezifikationen



 Anforderungen

Um für deinen Weg gewappnet zu sein, hast du folgende Qualifikationen im Gepäck:



Abgeschlossenes Studium und mindestens 2 Jahre Berufserfahrung mit IBM Planning Analytics mit Fokus auf Front- und Backenddevelopment
Leidenschaft für TM1-Architekturen, Komponenten, Deployment-Strategien und Performance-Tuning für großskalige Anwendungen 
Expertise in der Entwicklung von Planning Analytics Lösungen – von Frontend (PAW, UX/UI, Dashboard-Design, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React/Angular) bis Backend (TM1, Datenintegration via ETL/APIs/Middleware, Datenbanken wie SQL Server/Oracle sowie Skripting mit TurboIntegrator, Rules, SQL, TM1py) 
Deine Arbeitsweise ist geprägt von analytischem Denken, pragmatischem Vorgehen, Teamfähigkeit und Kundenorientierung 



Wissenswertes vor der Abfahrt:



Beginn: nach Vereinbarung – immer zu Beginn eines Monats

description_full:
Suchen Sie nach einer Herausforderung? Das bieten wir Ihnen!

Der Bereich „Finance Transformation” ist verantwortlich für die weltweite Abbildung der Finanz- und Controlling-Geschäftsprozesse vom ERP-Umfeld bis hin zum Gruppenberichtswesen (Record-to-Report).

Als Teil des Teams gestalten Sie die Weiterentwicklung der globalen Konzernplanung sowie der unternehmensweiten Datenanalytik - durch die Integration intelligenter Planungssysteme und die Unterstützung bei der Umsetzung von KI-gestützten Anwendungen.

Ihre Aufgaben


Haupt-Entwickler des globalen integrierten Konzernplanungssystems auf Basis von IBM Planning Analytics (TM1/PAW)
Technische Konzeption und Umsetzung von neuen Planungs-Konzepten im Projekt-Umfeld
Kontinuierliche Optimierung des bestehenden Konzernplanungssystems 
Entwicklung und Betreuung von Schnittstellen zwischen Planungssystem (TM1), Vorsystemen (SAP, Qlik) und KI-basierten Lösungen (Python) mit etablierten Standards (zB. oDATA)
Verantwortung für den technischen Support bei komplexen Fragestellungen
Technischer Ansprechpartner für Planungs-Themen: Begleitung des Controllings bei Planungs- und Forecasting-Prozessen
Interdisziplinäre Zusammenarbeit mit dem KI-Entwicklungsteam im Finanzbereich 


Unsere Anforderungen


Abgeschlossenes Hochschulstudium mit Schwerpunkt auf Wirtschaft und IT (z. B. Wirtschaftsinformatik, Business Analytics, Data Science, BWL mit Schwerpunkt Datenanalytik)
Fundierte Berufserfahrung mit IBM Planning Analytics (TM1) im Beratungsumfeld oder alternativ in einem international tätigen Unternehmen
Fachliche und technische Kenntnisse im Bereich Unternehmensplanung
Ausgeprägte IT-Affinität und Verständnis für komplexe IT-Prozesse
Ein hoher Grad an selbstständigem Arbeiten und ein großes Engagement mit hohem Qualitätsanspruch
Ausgeprägte Teamfähigkeit und Kommunikationsstärke
Verhandlungssichere Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift
Begeisterung für innovative Technologien und Entwicklungen im Bereich Künstliche Intelligenz
Wünschenswert: Erfahrung mit Reporting-Systemen (z. B. Qlik), Kenntnisse in Python (insbesondere TM1py) sowie ein grundlegendes Verständnis von Predictive Analytics und KI-gestützter Mustererkennung


Warum HEIDELBERG?

HEIDELBERG ist ein Unternehmen mit einer lebendigen Geschichte – seit über 175 Jahren verbinden wir Innovation mit Tradition. Wir glauben daran, dass wir unsere Zukunft gestalten können. Wenn alle an einem Strang ziehen, werden wir miteinander unsere Vision der Zukunft zur Wirklichkeit werden lassen.

Wir suchen zukünftige Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter, die mit uns im Team das HEIDELBERG von morgen aktiv mitgestalten. Wir suchen Mitarbeitende, die Ideen zu Konzepten und Konzepte zur Realität entwickeln. Wenn Sie nicht nur über Veränderung sprechen, sondern Themen tatkräftig umsetzen und dabei im Team arbeiten möchten, dann gestalten Sie mit uns aktiv eine nachhaltig erfolgreiche Zukunft. Wir schätzen Menschen, die Dinge in die Hand nehmen und andere Menschen auf den Weg dorthin mitnehmen.

Bei uns können Sie Ihre Fähigkeiten einsetzen und im Rahmen von Personalentwicklungsprogrammen Ihre Potentiale weiterentwickeln und ausschöpfen. Ihr Gehalt bei HEIDELBERG wird attraktiv sein, Ihr Arbeitsumfeld modern und Ihre sozialen Leistungen sehr gut.

Gut zu wissen

Selten gibt es Kandidaten, die alle Anforderungen zu 100% erfüllen. Auch wenn Sie nicht alle Anforderungen erfüllen, freuen wir uns in jedem Fall auf Ihre Bewerbung.

DAS BRINGST DU MIT ALS (SENIOR) CONSULTANT FÜR DATA & ANALYTICS

Mehrjährige Projekterfahrung in verschiedenen Business-Intelligence-Projekten und starkes Interesse für neue Technologien im Analytics-Umfeld.
Konzeptionelles Wissen in den Bereichen Business Intelligence- und Big-Data-Lösungen, Data Warehousing (Schichtenarchitekturen, Modellierungsmethoden), Advanced Analytics.
Fundierte Kenntnisse mit SQL, sowie mit modernen Data & Analytics-Plattformen und Tools von Microsoft, SAP wie bspw. Azure Data Factory, Azure Databricks, Microsoft Power BI, Microsoft Fabric, SAP Datasphere, SAC, S/4HANA Embedded Analytics / Fiori oder / und mit Open-Source- und Lakehouse-Tools wie Dremio.
Sehr gute Deutsch- und gute Englischkenntnisse sowie Spaß an der Kommunikation mit Kunden aus der D-A-CH Region.

Du schätzt gleichberechtigte Zusammenarbeit, löst gerne knifflige Aufgaben und möchtest in einem schnell wachsenden Unternehmen etwas bewegen. description_full:
Biesinger Management Consulting is a professional firm dedicated to delivering tailored recruitment and business solutions. 




Company Description




We search for our Client - an international market leader in the Building Materials Industry with several thousand employees in Central Europe and many locations in Germany.




Role Description:




Our client is looking for a motivated, strategic (senior) recruiter (m/f/d) with strong interpersonal skills, a passion for talent, and the ability to thrive in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.




The TALENT ACQUISITION PARTNER FOR GERMANY will manage the end-to-end recruitment process, from sourcing to hiring, to identify and onboard exceptional talent for various roles. The responsibility is collaboration with internal departments to develop and enhance employer branding strategies, ensure an engaging candidate experience, and to contribute to strategic hiring initiatives. The role offers flexibility with a combination of remote work and on-site responsibilities in the German facilities.




Tasks and responsibilities:

Take ownership of the full recruiting process, from sourcing to onboarding, for both specialist and leadership positions.
Collaborate with hiring managers to define clear and compelling job profiles.
Develop and implement effective sourcing strategies, including active sourcing, talent pools, campaigns, and partnerships with external providers.
Conduct interviews with candidates (m/f/d) via phone, video, or in-person, ensuring a professional and engaging candidate experience.
Shape and execute the talent acquisition strategy in alignment with your manager and HR colleagues.
Advise business leaders on selection methods and decision-making, serving as a trusted partner throughout the recruitment process.
Support contract negotiations alongside HR Business Partners and Compensation & Benefits teams.
Analyze local and regional labor markets, identify target groups, and maintain relationships with relevant authorities to meet regulatory requirements and attract top talent internationally.
Build and nurture a strong talent pool, establishing long-term relationships with candidates and future potential hires.
Contribute to employer branding initiatives and strengthen the company’s “Career” presence in Germany, collaborating on cross-functional HR projects.
Monitor and optimize recruiting performance using key metrics (KPIs) such as time-to-hire, time-to-fill, hiring quality, hiring manager satisfaction, and candidate experience.
Manage external partners, including recruitment agencies and online platforms, to ensure efficient and effective hiring processes.
Represent the company at career fairs, events, and university programs, proactively building professional networks.




Qualifications:

Proficiency in Full-Life Cycle Recruiting and Hiring processes, including sourcing, interviewing, and onboarding
More than 5 years experience in a Talent Acquisition Role in a company and/or in the Executive Search / Recruiting industry
Strong skills in Communication and Employer Branding to effectively represent the organization and engage potential candidates
Experience in Recruiting, with a proven ability to align hiring objectives with organizational goals
Excellent organizational and time-management skills
Proficiency in using applicant tracking systems and recruitment software is a MUST
Fluency in German and English, both spoken and written
Bachelor's degree or relevant professional experience in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field is preferred
Flexibility and frequent travelling required.

description_full:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Product Marketing Specialist in Germany.

This role sits at the intersection of product, marketing, and growth, with a strong focus on shaping how innovative ad tech solutions are positioned and adopted in the market. You will translate complex product capabilities into clear, compelling messaging that resonates with publishers and ad tech stakeholders. Acting as a key connector between product and sales teams, you will drive go-to-market execution, content strategy, and organic growth initiatives. The role blends strategic thinking with hands-on content creation, community engagement, and performance-driven marketing. You will operate in a fast-moving, remote-first environment that values autonomy, experimentation, and continuous improvement. This is an opportunity to directly influence product adoption and brand visibility across global markets.

Accountabilities


Define and execute go-to-market (GTM) strategies, including product positioning, messaging, and launch planning for new features and updates
Create and support marketing materials for product and sales teams to enable successful product adoption and revenue growth
Develop and manage a content strategy covering blogs, whitepapers, case studies, social media, and thought leadership content tailored to key audience pain points
Drive organic inbound growth through SEO-optimized content, social media distribution, and performance-focused content marketing initiatives
Act as a community voice across industry forums, newsletters, and social channels, building engagement within ad tech and publisher ecosystems
Collaborate closely with product, sales, and growth teams to align messaging, improve adoption, and support overall GTM execution


Requirements


3-5 years of experience in marketing roles, with strong emphasis on content creation, content strategy, or product marketing
Proven ability to create high-quality, engaging content across multiple channels, including digital, social, and long-form formats
Experience in copywriting, social media marketing, content marketing, or product marketing roles, ideally within SaaS environments
Strong understanding of product marketing fundamentals, with prior collaboration with product teams considered a strong advantage
Familiarity with ad tech or programmatic advertising is a plus, but not required
Strong communication and storytelling skills, with the ability to simplify complex technical concepts for diverse audiences
Hands-on experience with tools such as Notion, WordPress, Canva, ActiveCampaign (or similar), Salesforce, and SEO platforms
AI literacy and openness to using AI tools to enhance productivity and marketing workflows
Fluency in English required; Spanish or Portuguese is a plus for LATAM market focus


Benefits


Competitive salary adjusted to experience and cost of living
Fully remote work with complete location independence
Flexible working hours with autonomy over your schedule
Opportunity to work from anywhere in the world
Regular company retreats and in-person team meetups
Strong focus on career growth, learning, and skill development
Collaborative, culture-driven environment with global exposure

description_full:
About Us

HBX Group is the world’s leading technology partner for the travel industry — connecting and empowering global travel brands through cutting‑edge solutions. Our network spans 300,000 hotels, 60,000 high‑value and hard‑to‑reach clients (including tour operators, travel agents, OTAs, wholesalers, and loyalty schemes), and 140+ source markets.

We are a tech‑driven organisation with a customer‑first mindset and deep commercial expertise on the ground. Our people — Team HBX Group — are the heart of our business, encouraged to move fast, think big, and make an impact every day.

It’s the combination of technology + data + people, paired with our global reach and local expertise, that sets us apart.




Job Summary

We are looking for a strategic Senior Product Marketing Manager to bring HBX solutions to the travel distribution ecosystem. This role will own and optimise our value propositions, shape customer‑centric messaging, enable sales with high‑impact tools, and orchestrate cross‑functional go‑to‑market execution.

You will partner closely with product, commercial, and marketing teams to strengthen our narrative, accelerate product adoption, and support commercial activation across global travel distribution channels.




Key Responsibilities

Own and refine compelling value propositions aligned to customer needs and business priorities.
Build customer‑centric messaging frameworks and ensure consistency across all channels.
Partner with cross‑functional teams to define clear, differentiated messaging for solutions, features, and releases.
Develop and maintain battle cards, one‑pagers, solution briefs, FAQs, and other enablement assets.
Equip commercial teams with high‑quality materials that support conversions and articulate value clearly.
Gather structured customer and market feedback (surveys, interviews, workshops, social listening).
Use insights to iterate and strengthen messaging, value propositions, and sales tools.
Identify strategic customers with commercial teams to build impactful case studies and proof points.
Drive and coordinate cross‑functional GTM initiatives that increase adoption and commercial impact.
Ensure strong, consistent delivery of messaging across digital channels and the HBX website.
Collaborate with product and design teams to shape feature positioning and customer‑facing narratives.
Support adoption through user guides, product descriptions, and clear customer‑focused content.
Influence and align senior stakeholders across product, commercial, and marketing teams.
Drive unified messaging and cohesive execution across a matrixed organisation.




Skills & Experience

7+ years in product marketing, ideally within B2B travel technology, especially travel distribution (OTAs, wholesalers, tour operators, travel agencies, loyalty platforms, etc.).
Exceptional communicator with strong storytelling skills and the ability to simplify complex concepts for technical, executive, and customer audiences.
Strategic thinker with strong execution skills and attention to detail.
Proven ability to influence senior stakeholders and align cross‑functional teams.
Data‑driven, using metrics to shape narratives and guide decisions.
Proactive, accountable, and outcome‑focused — demonstrating an owner’s mindset.
Degree in Business, Marketing or related field; Master’s preferred.
Fluent English; additional languages a plus.




At HBX Group, we believe that diversity drives innovation and makes travel a force for good.

We're committed to creating an inclusive workplace where everyone feels valued and respected, embracing different backgrounds, perspectives, and talents. Join us and be part of a team where diversity and equal opportunities really do make a difference

description_full:
About JHC Consulting
JHC Consulting is a remote advisory firm whose work sits closer to judgment, review, and decision support than to routine execution. The work is often analytical in nature, but not in a purely mechanical sense. It involves examining information carefully, understanding what it supports and what it does not, and helping bring structure to material that may initially be incomplete, uneven, or difficult to interpret. We are looking for a Junior Data Analyst who wants to build strong analytical habits in a setting where clarity, precision, and professional discipline matter.

About the role
This is not a role built around producing dashboards for appearance alone, and it is not a volume-based reporting function. It is better suited to someone who is thoughtful with information, patient with detail, and able to work carefully without losing sight of the wider question.
You would support analytical work across research, review, and decision-support assignments. Some of the work may begin with raw data, spreadsheets, background materials, or fragmented inputs that need to be cleaned up and organized before they become useful. In other cases, the task may be to check whether figures align, whether assumptions are being relied upon too casually, or whether a summary is actually supported by the material behind it.
This is a junior position, but not one where you are expected to operate carelessly just because you are early in your career. We are interested in people who take accuracy seriously, think before they conclude, and understand that useful analysis often comes from reducing confusion rather than adding unnecessary complexity.

What you would do
In this role, you may be involved in:
reviewing datasets, spreadsheets, and supporting materials
cleaning and organizing information into usable working files
checking figures, categories, and source consistency
preparing summary tables, structured notes, and analytical support materials
identifying gaps, anomalies, inconsistencies, or weak comparisons
helping transform scattered information into clear and usable analysis
supporting internal and client-facing work where the factual basis matters


The work is likely to appeal to someone who finds satisfaction in making material clearer, more ordered, and more reliable.

What we are looking for
You do not need to have done everything before. What matters more is the way you work.
We would expect a strong candidate to have:

description_full:
BESTSECRET is the leading European online destination for premium and luxury off-price fashion. The Group offers its members in 27 countries across Europe a superior brand portfolio complemented by a high-end shopping experience. At the same time, BESTSECRET enables its brand partners to clear overstock at scale with minimum visibility and maximum brand equity protection. The unique business model is based on its closed character with an invitation-only customer membership, longstanding brand partner and customer relationships, combined with a tech-focused mindset. BESTSECRET has a strong track record of profitable growth over many years. It generated preliminary revenues of approx. EUR 1,415 million in 2024 and employs around 2,300 people from over 90 nations. The Group draws on a heritage of 100 years in the textile and fashion industry and today is owned by Permira Funds and the founding families Schustermann and Borenstein.

Your Responsibilities


Drive and coordinate weekly short‑ and mid‑term pricing activities for Retail Stores, closely aligned with current market, competitive and stock situations
Define and continuously refine country‑, category‑ and store‑specific pricing strategies, considering local market dynamics and retail specifics
Ensure an efficient, scalable and secure end‑to‑end pricing operation, covering tens of thousands of price changes per week across store networks
Monitor and analyze competitor pricing in offline retail, and translate insights into clear pricing actions that balance competitiveness and profitability
Analyze and interpret price elasticity and demand response in a retail context, proactively leveraging insights to steer pricing decisions
Partner with Buying, Retail Operations, Supply and Analytics teams to ensure pricing decisions are well understood and executed in store


Your Qualifications


Minimum 3 years of professional experience in pricing, revenue management or a comparable analytical role within B2C Fashion Retail or E‑Commerce; hands‑on Retail experience is a strong advantage
Strong analytical and quantitative skillset, including price analysis, forecasting, scenario simulation and optimization
Proven ability to work with large, complex datasets and translate data into actionable business recommendations (e.g. Power BI, SQL)
Solid understanding of commercial KPIs and the trade‑offs between margin, sell‑through, competitiveness and inventory risk
High level of ownership and proactivity – able to work independently, prioritize effectively and drive topics to completion in a complex organization
Strong stakeholder management & communication skills, with the ability to explain analytical insights clearly to diverse audiences, including senior management
Fluent business English (spoken and written); German language skills are a plus, especially in a retail environment


At BESTSECRET, diversity isn't just a trend – it's our professional philosophy. We are dedicated to cultivating an inclusive workplace where everyone's unique talents and backgrounds are celebrated. Applicants from all backgrounds, experiences and perspectives are welcome to join us in our mission towards a more vibrant and inclusive future.

description_full:
We are seeking an experienced Analyst, Pricing & Revenue Optimization, to join our Data Science & Analytics team as a strategic partner and technical expert!

In this role, you will steer our pricing strategy and commercial analytics function, translating complex data into actionable business insights that directly impact revenue and profitability. You will work collaboratively on high-impact projects and partner with senior leadership to shape data-driven commercial decisions across the organization.

Ready to become part of the most important mission on this planet? We are rebuy, pioneers in the sustainable reuse of electronics and media. and we are looking for you! Our mission: to make circular living accessible to all, one transaction at a time. By giving products a second chance, we reduce resource consumption and avoid unnecessary e-waste.

Our team of 600 comes from all corners of the world; we drive things forward collaboratively, take personal responsibility, value positive critical thinking, and persistently serve our customers and planet.

Key Responsibilities:


Develop and optimize end-to-end pricing strategies, including algorithm development, implementation, and continuous performance monitoring
Design and execute complex pricing experiments and A/B tests, analyzing results and providing strategic recommendations to leadership
Generate commercial insights by conducting deep-dive analyses on pricing elasticity, customer behavior, market dynamics, and competitive positioning
Collaborate with senior stakeholders in Commercial to identify opportunities and solve complex business challenges
Create and automate reporting frameworks and dashboards to enable self-service analytics across the organization
Establish best practices for pricing analytics, experimentation, and commercial decision-making
Stay current with industry trends in pricing optimization, e-commerce analytics, and circular economy business models
Approximately 5 years of experience in commercial analytics, pricing, or related analytical roles, preferably in e-commerce or marketplace environments
Strong proficiency in SQL and any major programming language
Ability to translate complex analyses into clear, actionable business recommendations
Effective stakeholder management and communication skills
Willingness to understand and challenge requirements and contribute your own solutions
Strategic mindset with strong business acumen and commercial awareness
Motivated and organized, thriving in dynamic environments
Willingness to learn and being excited about experimenting with new technology
Experience with pricing algorithms, dynamic pricing, or revenue management systems
Familiarity with data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Looker, Power BI) and DBT
Experience in sustainability-focused or circular economy businesses
Understanding of marketplace or two-sided platform dynamics


Location:


Berlin
Hybrid model


Purpose, a great company culture and incredible benefits - what to expect at rebuy:


Work with a friendly team that is passionate about circularity and wants to make the world a little more sustainable, one transaction at a time.
Feel comfortable in an environment where independence and new ideas are welcome.
Benefit from flat hierarchies and the greatest possible transparency so that things don't take longer than they have to and you always feel well informed.

Job Description

Leverage strong, hands-on expertise in at least two functional areas within the Murex ecosystem to support configuration, implementation, and continuous optimization aligned with business needs. Develop a deep understanding of banking and asset management processes, including interactions across front office, risk, finance, and operations, ensuring efficient and cohesive end-to-end solution design.

Responsibilities


Lead design workshops and show-and-tell sessions with business stakeholders and Murex teams, driving the identification of scalable and aligned solutions
Translate business requirements into clear functional specifications and guide stakeholders toward practical implementations
Perform gap analysis between business needs and standard Murex capabilities; define configurations, extensions, and interfaces accordingly

Plan and lead delivery phases using structured sprints and milestones
Ensure consistency and performance across the overall Murex application landscape

Participate in and support end-to-end testing activities to validate business readiness and system integrity


Qualifications


Extensive experience as a Business Analyst within a financial institution
Strong hands-on experience with Murex, including full lifecycle implementations
In-depth expertise in at least two Murex functional domains (e.g., FX, Rates, Fixed Income, Equities, Commodities), including:
Product configuration, pricing, and simulations
Valuations and P&L attribution
Market data and pricing templates
Rules definition, GOM setup, and FO configuration

Experience in planning and executing test strategies and campaigns
Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills
German – mandatory (professional working proficiency)

description_full:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Marketing Operations Analyst in Germany.

This role sits at the core of marketing execution and performance, ensuring that campaigns, projects, and workflows run smoothly across a fully distributed global team. You will help coordinate marketing initiatives that drive user acquisition, engagement, and retention in a fast-paced, data-driven environment. The position blends project management, analytics, and operational support, making it essential to the success of cross-functional marketing efforts. You will work closely with multiple teams to track performance, optimize processes, and ensure alignment with broader business objectives. This is a highly collaborative role where attention to detail, structure, and data accuracy directly impact marketing effectiveness. Operating in a remote-first culture, you will contribute to improving efficiency, transparency, and scalability across global marketing operations.

Accountabilities

You will be responsible for supporting the planning, coordination, and execution of marketing operations, ensuring smooth delivery of campaigns and continuous improvement of marketing processes.


Assist in planning, tracking, and managing marketing projects and campaigns to ensure timely execution and alignment with business priorities.
Coordinate resources, tasks, and priorities across marketing and cross-functional teams in a fully remote environment.
Monitor campaign performance and prepare reports with actionable insights to support decision-making.
Support the development and maintenance of project documentation, timelines, workflows, and operational processes.
Collaborate with internal teams to ensure alignment between marketing initiatives and broader organizational goals.
Assist in vendor coordination, including contract support, deliverable tracking, and performance follow-up.
Maintain data accuracy, integrity, and consistency across marketing systems and reporting tools.
Conduct market and industry research, including fintech and crypto trends, to support marketing strategy and briefs.
Help implement and optimize marketing tools and workflows to improve operational efficiency.


Requirements

You are a motivated and detail-oriented professional with a strong interest in marketing operations, analytics, and project coordination in a fast-moving digital environment.


Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Design, Communications, or a related field.
Familiarity with marketing analytics and advertising platforms such as Google Analytics, LinkedIn, Instagram, or Looker.
Strong analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and generate actionable insights.
Excellent organizational and time-management skills, with the ability to manage multiple priorities effectively.
Strong communication and teamwork skills, with experience collaborating across distributed teams.
High level of curiosity, adaptability, and willingness to learn new tools and technologies.
Exposure to marketing, advertising, or communications through academic work, internships, or projects.
Proactive, solution-oriented mindset with creativity in problem-solving.
Nice-to-haves: interest in fintech and cryptocurrency marketing, experience with lead generation strategies, and familiarity with marketing automation or tracking tools.


Benefits

You will join a fully remote, global-first organization that values autonomy, flexibility, and continuous learning.


100% remote work from anywhere in the world.
Flexible working arrangements supporting work-life balance.
Opportunity to work in a high-growth fintech environment with global impact.
Annual learning and development budget to support professional growth.
Collaborative, high-performance culture focused on excellence and innovation.
Flexible PTO policy to support rest and personal well-being.

description_full:
For over 100 years, Deutsche Grammophon has been one of the world’s most prestigious and influential music companies: We are the market leader in classical music. Our artists include stars such as Anne-Sophie Mutter, Anna Netrebko, Daniel Barenboim, and Rolando Villazón, as well as promising newcomers like Daniil Trifonov, Alice Sara Ott, and Camille Thomas. We also represent the outstanding artists and catalogs of the Decca, Mercury Classics, and ECM labels.

Analytics, big data and cloud technologies are essential to our business. In the world of digital distribution channels and social media, we have access to more information than ever before. In the area of data analytics, we conduct in-depth analyses to better understand the listening behaviour of music fans and thus optimally market our artists and improve the listening experience. The findings of our analysis have strategic implications, such as the engagement of talented artists, the design of marketing activities and the allocation of resources.

We are seeking a highly analytical and problem solver-oriented individual to join our team for our streaming platform Stage+ . The successful candidate will be responsible for analyzing marketing campaigns and product data to provide insights and recommendations that will drive business growth and improve customer experience. The ideal candidate will be able to work cross-functionally with product and marketing teams, using data that will have a direct impact on the strategy of Stage+.

Here’s your chance to join! Effective immediately, we’re looking for a Product & Marketing Analyst (all genders) to join us at our Headquarters in Berlin. It will be a permanent full-time position.

Your Gig


Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to analyze large data sets, identify trends and patterns, and provide insights and recommendations to both product and marketing teams
Develop and implement tracking concepts in our website and apps (mobile and TV)

About Agoda

At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.

Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.

No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.

Get to know our team: 

The Marketing team at Agoda is highly data-driven and focused on developing at-scale, measurable marketing programs designed to improve the lifetime value of Agoda customers. The team combines a blend of the best analysts, marketing strategists and data scientists, collectively building a team that thrives on data, creative ideas and technology. . The Marketing leadership fosters a great learning environment, providing the opportunity to learn and grow by working closely with experts from a diverse variety of backgrounds from across the globe.

Due to continued expansion, there are multiple analyst roles within the marketing team across different marketing channels. While the scope will vary depending on these channels, here are some examples: 


Experimentation and optimizing campaign performance: Experiment with ads/campaign structures and bidding& pricing strategies on partners such as Google, Bing, Tripadvisor, Trivago and other search engines. Adapt to new product features and roll out changes from successful tests.
Modeling: Analyze vast amounts of data generated by experiments, develop predictive models using data science techniques (eg. understanding impact on bookings from large scale TV campaigns or demand elasticity from pricing optimization) and liaise with product teams on implementation roadmap
Reporting, analysis and insights: Building dashboards to track performance, derive insights, understand growth levers and communicate recommendations via presentations to stakeholders


What you’ll Need to Succeed: 


Bachelor’s degree or higher from top university in a quantitative subject (computer science, mathematics, engineering business or science)
Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English
2+ years experience in data crunching from top-tier consulting, investment banking, private equity or strategy/business for a fast-growing globaltech company
Experience in one or more data analysis packages or databases, eg., SAS, R, SPSS, Python, VBA, SQL and visualization tools, eg. Tableau, Power BI
Ability to move fast and be efficient, making decisions on objective evidence rather than subjective gut feel
Innate desire to take ownership, make an impact and influence outcomes
Excellent organizational skills, attention to detail and ability to work independently


It’s great if you have: 


Experience in digital marketing or ecommerce
Experience with A/B testing and other testing metrics
Strong presentation and negotiation skills
Skills that foster collaboration and team spirit

Position Overview

Über den Bereich

In der Privatkundenbank bündelt die Deutsche Bank ihre Expertise im Privatkundengeschäft in einem Geschäftsbereich – mit den Marken Deutsche Bank und Postbank als Marktführer in Deutschland und einem globalen Netzwerk, die das Geschäft der Bank mit vermögenden Kund*innen weltweit sowie mit Privatkund*innen und kleinen bis mittelgroßen Unternehmen umfasst. In ihrem Heimatmarkt Deutschland wie auch international bietet die Privatkundenbank ihren Kund*innen hochwertige Finanzdienstleistungen aus einer Hand – von umfassenden Angeboten für Privatkund*innen über die Betreuung anspruchsvoller Unternehmer und ihrer Familien bis hin zu Lösungen für kleinere und mittelgroße Unternehmen in wichtigen Märkten der Eurozone. Die Privatkundenbank ist neben der Unternehmensbank , der Investmentbank und dem Asset Management mit ihrem Vermögensverwalter DWS eine der vier Geschäftsbereiche des Deutsche-Bank-Konzerns. Die Deutsche Bank ist Deutschlands führende Bank mit globalem Netzwerk und fest verwurzelt in Europa.

Deine Aufgaben


Du setzt den Maßstab für Performance – definierst, konsolidierst und governst ein ganzheitliches KPI‑Framework für Media, Web und CX und verankerst es wirksam in allen Marketingprozessen.

Du gehst routiniert mit Datenanalyse, Segmentierung und Forecasting um – inklusive Search‑ und Paid‑Logiken sowie modellbasierter Prognosen.
Du verfügst über starke Expertise in Data Visualization & BI und entwickelst aussagekräftige, stakeholdergerechte Dashboards (z. B. Power BI oder Tableau).
Du setzt Predictive und KI‑gestützte Analytics praxisnah ein, um Insights zu skalieren – etwa durch automatisierte Auswertungen, Pattern Detection oder Prognosen.
Du verstehst CLV‑Modelle und Werttreiberlogiken und nutzt sie, um Marketingmaßnahmen daten‑ und value‑basiert zu priorisieren.

description_full:
Based In Frankfurt

2 days working from home, three days in the office




The Change Partners are working with a global leader in the home wellness and sleep technology sector. We are looking for an ambitious, "pricing-first" Global Performance & Value Manager to join their Category Performance, Pricing & Market Intelligence team in Lisbon.




You will be the bridge between complex data and actionable strategy. Your mission is to provide the data, frameworks, and strategic insights that make better portfolio decisions possible across the full product lifecycle.




Your Responsibilities:




Category Performance Intelligence: Design and own global performance dashboards in partnership with BI teams, tracking revenue, margin, and NPS correlation by SKU and channel.




Pricing Architecture: Design and maintain global price ladders, pricing tiers, and trade-up logic to ensure portfolio coherence across all market clusters.
Value Capture: Maintain a pricing elasticity model and conduct regular price-value assessments to ensure products are priced relative to consumer-perceived value.




Promotional Governance: Define promo guardrails and build tracking models to measure actual ROI vs. planned, protecting the brand from margin erosion.
Competitive Intelligence: Own a structured view of the competitive landscape, tracking rival pricing, launches, and promotional activity across key markets.




Market Intelligence: Develop repeatable processes for market sizing and category growth analysis to identify white-space opportunities and strategic risks.




Business Case Support: Serve as the analytical partner to Global and Regional Category Managers, building validated business cases for new product investments and expansion.




Analytics Empowerment: Develop self-service tools and templates that help the broader category team make faster, data-backed decisions.




What We’re Looking For:




Experience: 5–8 years in pricing, business analytics, revenue management, or category performance within a consumer goods, DTC, or e-commerce context.




Pricing Strategy: A proven track record of designing pricing frameworks and understanding the interplay between pricing, perceived value, and margin.




Data Literacy: Highly analytical mindset with the ability to translate complex data into clear, decision-ready business recommendations.




Statistical Foundation: Solid understanding of statistics (hypothesis testing, regressions) and clustering methods like k-means.




Data Visualisation: Proven experience building performance dashboards in BI tools such as Tableau, Power BI, or Looker.




Technical Proficiency: Working knowledge of Python for data analysis (pandas, data cleaning, and exploratory analysis).




Please note this role is based in Frankfurt, and you’ll need the full right to work in Germany

Relocation package support is not available

description_full:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Product Manager, Growth & Analytics, Beeper in Germany.

This role sits at the core of product growth strategy, where data, experimentation, and execution converge to shape user behavior and business outcomes. You will take ownership of growth initiatives, identifying what drives activation, retention, and monetization while continuously refining the product experience. Working closely with leadership and engineering teams, you will turn ambiguous product questions into measurable experiments and actionable insights. The environment is highly analytical and fast-moving, requiring strong independence and intellectual rigor. You will directly influence how users engage with the product and how value is captured across the user journey. This is a high-ownership role for a product thinker who is equally comfortable in data, strategy, and execution.

Accountabilities


Own end-to-end product execution for growth initiatives, including defining specs, user stories, success criteria, and experiment frameworks
Design, run, and analyze experiments from hypothesis to launch to results interpretation, ensuring clear learning outcomes
Build and maintain core product dashboards covering activation, retention, conversion, and engagement metrics used by leadership
Conduct deep-dive analysis when key metrics shift, identifying root causes and recommending actionable solutions
Collaborate with engineering and support teams to validate product behavior and confirm the impact of shipped features
Maintain accurate and up-to-date product documentation, including specifications, release notes, and internal references
Translate data insights into product decisions and communicate findings clearly across technical and non-technical stakeholders


Requirements


4-6 years of experience in product management, growth, analytics, or a closely related role with full ownership of product execution
Strong SQL skills including CTEs, window functions, cohort analysis, and funnel-based querying (required)
Experience working with cloud data warehouses and building dashboards or recurring analytical reports
Ability to write clear product specifications that guide engineering execution and data-driven summaries for leadership
Hands-on experience running experiments and understanding the full lifecycle of product testing and learning
Strong analytical mindset with the ability to interpret complex datasets and translate them into product decisions
Familiarity with A/B testing frameworks and experiment design methodologies
Experience with consumer, messaging, or subscription-based products is a plus
Ability to work with imperfect or incomplete data while maintaining analytical rigor
Strong communication skills and ability to operate independently in a fast-paced, distributed team environment


Benefits


Competitive salary range of $120,000-$190,000 USD (adjusted for location and paid in local currency)
Fully remote work with global flexibility and autonomy
Open vacation policy supporting work-life balance
Opportunity to work on high-impact consumer products at global scale
Strong ownership culture with direct visibility into leadership decisions
Collaborative, distributed team environment across multiple time zones
Exposure to modern growth, analytics, and experimentation frameworks
Inclusive, mission-driven organization focused on open web and digital communication

We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.

We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

description_full:
Totum is working with a preeminent global law firm to hire for this fantastic opportunity.




This role is perfect for an ambitious individual who wishes to be part of a progressive, proactive and customer-centric team. The successful candidate will play an integral part of driving forward the continuous improvement agenda for the Commercial Finance and Revenue Operations function and its collaboration with other business support professionals. You will be an experienced pricing professional, with strong communication and soft skills, able to work effectively with internal and external stakeholders.




Key Purpose




In conjunction with Commercial Finance colleagues, the Manager, Pricing and Commercial Insights EMEAPAC will support on the development and execution of the firms pricing agenda ensuring the necessary benchmarking, analytical tools and capabilities exist to support firm and finance departmental strategies.




Responsibilities:




Advise Partners of ways to maximise the value of client relationships through different pricing techniques, modelling the financial impact and viability of proposed pricing arrangements and challenging key decision makers when appropriate
Supporting Partners with client facing engagements where needed
Business partnering with the country COO, Client Relationship Partners and the Client Development team to provide financial and commercial support, plan deployment and investment to help drive profitability
Support partners in pricing complex transactions across EMEAPAC, ensuring pricing governance and consistency with the established pricing framework
Maintaining a high level of visibility in serving as one of the firm’s subject matter experts for pricing and commercial related matters
Supporting pricing team promotional efforts including delivering presentations to key stakeholders to increase internal adoption and market awareness and raise the profile of the PCI team within Germany. Encourage broader and better use of the Firm’s tools to develop more profitable and consistent pricing approaches
Supporting on the provision of education to stakeholders involved in pricing proposals and approvals, advancing pricing as a strategic tool to build and enhance client relationships
Assist Partners in the development of budgets and monitoring against actual performance for matters, particularly complex litigation work where more detailed project management support may be required
The Pricing Manager will act as an advocate and agent for adopting effective legal project management discipline where necessary
Ensuring strong working relationships with other support functions, in particular Business Development leads to establish, promote and maintain policies and processes required for effective management of pricing for transactions, bids and panel appointments
Keep abreast of industry pricing practices, particularly for major competitors and assess key trends. Support in the development of pricing models and tools for legal services and monitor profitability and implementation of those models
In conjunction with other business support professionals, provide advice to stakeholders in relation to improving matter financial performance through the provision of post matter financial analysis and associated pricing and business information
Collaboration and support on any ad hoc commercial and pricing related initiatives as required




Essential:




At least 5 years relevant pricing experience. Preference will be given to candidates with legal or wider professional services pricing experience
Strong commercial acumen and exceptional analysis and financial modelling skills
Excellent written and verbal communication (in German and English) and has strength of personality to ensure the perspective of ‘Finance’ is clearly communicated
Excellent time management skills, able to manage stakeholders during times of conflicting deliverables. The ability to remain calm and focused under pressure

Join us in making a difference



The Marketing Strategy and Intelligence team at trivago is a unique blend of data and business expertise, steering key marketing decisions through impactful data products, actionable insights, and deep market understanding. As a Data Analyst, you will play a critical role in shaping and executing trivago's global marketing strategy. Your work will empower teams to make informed choices that drive growth, efficiency, and innovation across all marketing channels.

You will collaborate closely with data scientists, analysts, engineers as well as growth managers and business stakeholders to transform complex data into real business value. Together, you will design advanced analytics solutions, develop insightful dashboards and reports, and uncover strategic opportunities through in-depth research, modeling and experimentation. By providing clear, actionable insights, you will help optimize campaigns, identify market trends, and guide the decision-making process.

If this sounds like you, read on & apply today!



How you’ll make an impact:


Translate data into actionable insights that shape our marketing strategy and investments.
Partner with marketing stakeholders to identify opportunities, define KPIs, and measure success.
Build clear, engaging dashboards and reports that highlight trends and tell compelling stories.
Conduct deep dives to understand performance drivers, uncover anomalies, and recommend actions.
Ensure marketing data quality and consistency across multiple sources.
Share your insights in a way that resonates with both technical and non-technical audiences.


What you'll need to thrive:


5+ years of experience as a Data Analyst, ideally in marketing, e-commerce, or digital growth.
A degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science, or another quantitative field.
Strong business acumen - you connect the dots between numbers, customer behavior, and company goals.
Proficiency in SQL and hands-on experience with BI/dashboarding tools (e.g., Tableau, Looker).
Proven ability to tell stories with data - making complex findings clear, engaging, and actionable.
Solid understanding of marketing metrics, attribution, and campaign performance.
Excellent communication skills in English, both written and verbal.


Stand out with:


Experience in the travel, e-commerce, or digital marketing industry.
Hands-on experience with A/B testing, geo testing, or causal inference.
Knowledge of big data platforms like BigQuery.
Familiarity with Python or R for analysis.

Worried about missing a few requirements? Still apply, and express your motivation as you may just be the right candidate for this or other roles!



What you can look forward to:



As you grow, so do we.

This is why at trivago, we prioritize your development, offer personalized coaching through Nilo, and provide workshops, educational meetups, conferences, free online learning courses, and access to a fully-equipped campus library.

Moving to join us?

No problem. You can count on the visa support from our talent support team, a relocation package, interest-free newcomer loan, free language classes, regular team and company-wide events to build experiences together.

description_full:
Evotec is seeking a dynamic

Market Research Lead (all genders)

Full time and permanent

Role Overview

The Market Research Lead will lead Evotec’s market research strategy within the Competitive Intelligence function, acting as the primary driver of actionable insights on market dynamics, customer needs, and competitive positioning. This role is responsible for designing and implementing frameworks that monitor industry trends, market opportunities, and competitor strategies to inform strategic decisions across corporate and business segments. Reporting directly to the SVP, Head of Competitive Intelligence, the Director will collaborate closely with the CI Leadership Team to ensure market intelligence is fully integrated with science & commercial insights and business analytics, strengthening Evotec’s competitive advantage and supporting sustainable growth.

Responsibilities


Market Research Strategy & Alignment
Define and execute Evotec’s market intelligence strategy in alignment with corporate priorities and business objectives.
Translate market trends and competitive signals into actionable recommendations for portfolio strategy, commercial positioning, and growth initiatives.
Support annual and long-range planning with market forecasts, opportunity assessments, and scenario analyses.
Competitive & Market Analysis
Lead comprehensive analysis of industry trends, therapeutic areas, and competitor strategies across global markets.
Monitor pricing benchmarks, business models, and partnership structures to inform Evotec’s commercial approach.
Deliver forward-looking insights on emerging technologies, regulatory shifts, and market disruptions impacting Evotec’s positioning.
Intelligence Integration & Collaboration
Work closely with the CI Leadership Team to integrate market intelligence with scientific insights and business analytics.
Partner with BD, Commercial Strategy, R&D and Operations teams to embed market insights into decision-making processes.
Support strategic projects such as portfolio prioritization, go-to-market strategies, and partnership evaluations.
Tools, Methodologies & Best Practices
Champion best practices in market intelligence methodologies, tools, and data sources.
Ensure governance and consistency in market data collection, validation, and reporting.
Drive adoption of advanced CI tools and platforms to enhance insight generation.
Strategic Communication & Leadership Support
Prepare and deliver high-impact reports, dashboards, and presentations for senior stakeholders.
Communicate complex market insights in a clear, actionable manner to diverse audiences.
Represent Market Research in internal forums as a thought leader.
